reported_entities.name: TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited) 台積電 - Official Website
reported_entities.claim: Official corporate website of TSMC, the world's dedicated semiconductor foundry founded in 1987.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Corporate Headquarters
reported_entities.claim: Headquarters address: 8, Li-Hsin Rd. 6, Hsinchu Science Park, Hsinchu 300-096, Taiwan, R.O.C. Phone: 886-3-5636688. Fax: 886-3-5637000.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Asia Pacific Business Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: 25, Li-Hsin Rd., Hsinchu Science Park, Hsin-Chu 300-78, Taiwan, R.O.C. Phone: 886-3-5636688, Fax: 886-3-5662051, Email: sales_asia@tsmc.com.

reported_entities.name: TSMC North America Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: 2851 Junction Avenue, San Jose, CA 95134, U.S.A. Phone: +1-408-382-8000, Fax: +1-408-382-8008.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Europe Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: World Trade Center, Zuidplein 60, 1077 XV, Amsterdam, The Netherlands. Phone: 31-20-3059900, Email: g_emea@tsmc.com.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Japan Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: 21F, Queen's Tower C, 2-3-5, Minatomirai, Nishi-ku, Yokohama, Japan 220-6221. Email: Info_BD@tsmc.com.

reported_entities.name: TSMC China (Shanghai) Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: 4000 Wen Xiang Road, Songjiang, Shanghai, China, Postcode 201616. Phone: 86-21-57768000 Ext: 2236, Fax: 86-21-57762525.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Korea Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: Rm. 2104-2105 West, Hanshin Inter Valley 24 Building, 322 Teheran-ro, Gangnam-Gu, Seoul 06211, Rep. of Korea. Phone: 82-2-21831688.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Canada Office
reported_entities.claim: Address: 1000 Innovation Drive, Suite 400, Ottawa, ON K2K 3E7, Canada. Phone: 1-613-5761990.

reported_entities.name: TSMC ESG / Sustainability site
reported_entities.claim: Official Traditional Chinese sustainability/ESG microsite under the TSMC domain.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Press Release Center
reported_entities.claim: Official press/news subdomain of TSMC for latest news releases.

notes: One WebSearch confirmed the official tsmc.com domain and located the business_contacts page; one WebFetch on that page pulled full HQ and regional office contact details (phone/fax/email/address) for HQ plus APAC, North America, Europe, Japan, China, Korea, and Canada offices.
